checkout.title: Checkout
onboarding.desc1: From hotel rooms to apartments and beach clubs — we deliver from Sharm's best kitchens.
onboarding.desc2: We tell you the ETA up front. Miss it by 15 minutes, you get credit automatically.
onboarding.desc3: See prices in EUR, USD, GBP, or RUB. Paid in EGP at today's rate. No surprises.
signin.title: Enter your phone
signin.subtitle: We'll send a 6-digit code over WhatsApp or SMS.
signin.terms: By continuing you agree to the Terms & Privacy Policy.
otp.title: Enter the code
otp.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to
home.greetingSubIftar: Iftar plates, on the way to you
home.allergyNudgeSub: Save your allergies and the kitchen sees them on every order.
browse.title: Browse
restaurant.closedBanner: This restaurant is closed right now. You can browse the menu, but ordering will reopen when they're back.
item.allergiesSubtitle: Pre-selected from your profile. Tap to remove just for this order.
allergy.title: Allergies
allergy.subtitle: Pick anything you want the kitchen to avoid. We'll attach this to every order.
allergy.empty: No allergies set. We'll skip the warnings.
allergy.conflictWarning: This item contains {allergens}. You said you avoid this.
cart.title: Your order
cart.emptyDesc: Pick a restaurant to start an order.
checkout.kitchenBriefingDesc: Aggregated from your cart. Add anything else they should know.
checkout.dropoffQuietBanner: Quiet dropoff — driver won't ring the bell or knock.
checkout.orderWideNotesPlaceholder: e.g. ring the doorbell twice, leave at reception
checkout.promoInvalid: That code isn't valid for this order.
checkout.conversion: ≈ {amount} charged to your card · today's rate {rate}
address.title: Delivery address
address.beachHint: Drag the pin or tap the map to set your exact spot.
address.pinHint: Drag the pin or tap the map to set your exact spot.
address.locationDenied: Location permission is off. Drag the pin on the map, or tap here to enable location in Settings.
address.locationFailed: Couldn't get a GPS fix. Tap the map or drag the pin to set your spot manually.
address.pinRecommended: Pin your exact spot so your driver finds you.
address.saveError: Couldn't save your address. Please check your connection and try again.
payment.title: Payment method
payment.cashSubline: Pay the driver when your order arrives
order.noCallNeeded: No phone call needed · we have your room details
order.slaChip: On us if late by 15+ min
order.slaLine: We promise {time}. If we miss by 15 minutes, {credit} is automatically credited to you — no support call needed.
order.cancelConfirmBody: The restaurant hasn't accepted yet, so you can still cancel free of charge.
order.cancelFailed: Couldn't cancel the order — the restaurant may have already accepted it. Contact support if you still need help.
order.cancelledBody: This order was cancelled. You haven't been charged.
order.rejectedBody: The restaurant couldn't take this order. You haven't been charged — sorry about that.
review.title: How was it?
orders.reorderNeedsRebuild: This order has customisations we can't re-add automatically. Open the menu to add them again.
profile.title: Profile
invite.title: Invite friends
invite.heroSub: Share your code. Your friend gets EGP 50 off their first order — you get EGP 50 once it's delivered.
invite.shareMessage: Order from Sharm's best kitchens with Sharm Eats. Use my code {code} for EGP 50 off your first order: {url}
invite.step1: Share your code with a friend
invite.step2: They enter it at checkout and get EGP 50 off their first order (min EGP 150)
invite.step3: Once their order is delivered, you get EGP 50 off your next one
invite.terms: Reward applies after your friend's first order is delivered. One referral per new customer.
invite.shareError: Couldn't open sharing. Please try again.
rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.redeemConfirm: Redeem {points} points for a discount code?
rewards.redeemSuccess: Code {code} added — apply it at checkout.
rewards.historyEmpty: No activity yet — your first order will start earning points.
wallet.title: Credit wallet
wallet.subtitle: Refunds and late-delivery credits land here automatically.
wallet.redeemButton: Turn credit into a discount code
wallet.redeemConfirm: Turn {amount} of credit into a one-time discount code?
wallet.redeemSuccess: Code {code} added — apply it at checkout.
wallet.empty: No credit yet. If an order arrives late, we credit you here automatically.
settings.title: Settings
deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.heading: Permanently delete your account
deleteAccount.intro: This permanently deletes your Sharm Eats account and your personal data — your profile, saved addresses, payment methods, favourites, and notification settings.
deleteAccount.ordersNote: For legal and tax reasons we keep a record of completed orders, but we remove your name, phone, address, and location from them so they can no longer be linked to you.
deleteAccount.irreversible: This cannot be undone. You'll be signed out and would need to create a new account to order again.
deleteAccount.activeOrderBlock: You have an order in progress. Please wait until it's delivered or cancelled before deleting your account.
deleteAccount.error: We couldn't delete your account. Please check your connection and try again, or contact support.
deleteAccount.successBody: Your account and personal data have been deleted. Thank you for using Sharm Eats.
help.title: Help
common.error: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
menu.empty: Nothing available right now — please check back soon.
checkout.contactHint: Your driver will call this number if needed
checkout.needPhone: Add a contact number to place your order
chat.title: Chat
chat.empty: No messages yet. Say hi to your driver or the restaurant.
support.title: Support
support.intro: Chat with the Sharm Eats team. We usually reply within a few minutes.
